encounter.location: Alamo Family Practice, San Antonio, TX

vitals.name: body weight
vitals.note: Self-reported by patient during telemedicine visit; not measured in office

vitals.name: body mass index
vitals.note: Estimated from self-reported weight and chart height; not directly measured

screening.name: PHQ-2 depression screening
screening.interpretation: Negative; does not meet threshold for further screening with PHQ-9

conditions.name: overweight
conditions.note: Stable. Estimated BMI ~28.4. Counseled on diet and exercise.

conditions.name: dyslipidemia, borderline
conditions.note: New diagnosis. LDL 128, HDL 44, triglycerides 178, total cholesterol 210. 10-year ASCVD risk below statin threshold. Plan is lifestyle modification with dietary counseling.

conditions.name: morning finger stiffness, bilateral, new onset
conditions.note: Bilateral morning finger stiffness lasting 15–20 minutes, resolving with activity. No objective joint swelling. Attributed by patient to occupational use and cooler weather. Plan to monitor; return for in-office evaluation if duration exceeds 30 minutes, worsens, or swelling develops.

document_references.description: Telemedicine annual wellness visit progress note documenting video-based annual wellness visit during COVID-19 pandemic, including review of systems, verbal PHQ-2 screening, self-reported vitals, musculoskeletal complaint, lab orders and results, assessment, and plan. Addendum dated 2020-10-22 documents review of lab results and communication to patient via portal.

diagnostic_reports.description: CMP resulted 2020-10-22 and reported as within normal limits. Only four individual component values explicitly stated (glucose 101, creatinine 1.0, ALT 24, AST 22). Remaining standard CMP components not individually reported.
